title: BeeRegenPlugin
description: Regenerates bees in hives that are missing them and despawns bees after a set lifespan or if lost.
body:
A Minecraft plugin that manages the bee population in your world by providing automatic bee spawning, controlled lifespans, and intelligent lost bee handling.

## Features

- **Automatic Bee Spawning**: Beehives automatically spawn new bees at configurable intervals
- **Multi-World Support**: Works across all worlds in your server
- **Population Control**: Limits how many bees can spawn per hive and per time interval
- **Configurable Lifespans**: Set how long bees should live before despawning
- **Lost Bee Management**: Intelligently tracks and manages bees that wander too far from home
- **Proximity Detection**: Identifies when lost bees have found new hives nearby
- **Customizable Settings**: Fully configurable timing parameters for all aspects of bee behavior
- **Performance Optimized**: Uses efficient calculations to minimize server impact
- **Tick-Based Timing**: Precise control using Minecraft's internal tick system
# 
Perfect for servers looking to maintain a balanced bee ecosystem without overwhelming the game with entities or letting bee populations die out completely.
